title: Billing
subtitle: See your TUFStellar subscription status, important dates, and recent payment activity in one place.
loadError: Could not load billing details. Try again in a moment.

summary.inactive: You do not have an active paid period right now. Subscribe below to unlock TUFStellar benefits.
summary.activeRenewing: Your subscription is active and renews automatically on the date shown. Benefits stay on until that renewal unless you cancel.
summary.activeCancelling: You turned off automatic renewal. You keep full benefits until the access end date below. Use Resubscribe if you change your mind.
summary.checkoutPending: Your payment went through and we are finishing activation with our billing partner. Cancel and some account actions may appear shortly.

details.title: Subscription details
details.empty: After you subscribe, renewal and access dates will appear here. For invoice and transaction IDs, use the activity table below.

hints.activating: Activation is almost done — cancel will be available in a moment.

actions.subscribeDescription: Opens our secure checkout in a new browser tab. Complete payment there to activate your subscription.
actions.resubscribeDescription: Starts billing renewals again for your existing subscription. You are not charged again until your next renewal date.
actions.cancelDescription: Cancels future renewals only. You keep TUFStellar access until the end of the current paid period.
actions.noneNeeded: There is nothing to do here right now. Check back after checkout or when your subscription changes.

history.title: Recent activity
history.subtitle: Each row is a billing notification we received, newest first. Use the reference column when you contact support or your bank about a specific charge.
history.empty: No billing events yet. After you subscribe or make changes, entries will show up here.

cancelConfirm.title: Stop automatic renewal?
cancelConfirm.body: Future renewals will stop. You keep TUFStellar benefits until {{date}}.

toasts.checkoutOpened: Complete your purchase in the new tab. Allow pop-ups for this site if checkout did not appear.
toasts.checkoutError: Could not start checkout. Please try again.
toasts.checkoutBlockedActive: You already have an active subscription. Billing details were refreshed.
toasts.checkoutUseResubscribe: Your plan is set to end — use Resubscribe instead of starting a new checkout.
toasts.subscriptionNotReady: Subscription is still activating or billing details are not ready yet. Refresh and try again shortly.
toasts.cancelRequested: Automatic renewal is off. Benefits stay until the period ends.
toasts.cancelError: Could not cancel. Please try again.
toasts.resubscribeSuccess: Renewals are on again for your current subscription.
toasts.resubscribeError: Could not resume renewals. Please try again.

callback.title: Finalizing your subscription
callback.waiting: Confirming your payment with our system…
callback.statusNotDone: Payment was not completed. You can try again from the billing page.
